lines.speaker: Produced by
lines.text: Robert Carlock and Wendy Knoller
Final check by Kim
Central Perk, everyone except Phoebe is there

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (she enters) Hey...

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Pheebs, what's wrong?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, I'm just so exhausted from dragging around this... (she shows her ring) HUGE engagement ring!

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: OH!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: My God!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Congratulations! Wow!!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: So, did he get on one knee, did he have a speech prepared, or (in a tender way) did he cry? (the guys look at him) Yeah, big surprise, I like proposals!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, it was really sweet, and like the most romantic thing ever.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, hey! Well... (he takes his mug to toast Phoebe) Here's to Phoebe, who's found the greatest guy in the world! To Phoebe and... (a bit uncertain) I wanna say Mike? (pause) To Phoebe and Mike!

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Whoo!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Thank you! (to Rachel) Oh, and I have something for you!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Mmh-mmh!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: It's, yes, my little black book. It's got the numbers of all the guys I've dated.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, Pheebs, baby, that's nice but, you know what, I think I'm ok. Why don't you give it to one of your other single girlfriends?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I would, but you're the last one.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (angrily) GIVE ME THE BOOK! (she takes it and start reading) Pablo Diaz, Brady Smith, huh, "Guy-in-van"?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, my first love!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What does the red X next to Bob Greenmore's name mean?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Dead. (everyone is a bit upset) Oh, it's OK, no, he was old, yeah! And he lived a full life, he was in the first wave at Omaha Beach.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey, I'm sorry, I should have given you guys my black book when I got married! Although it wasn't so much a book as a... napkin. With Janice's phone number on it.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Phoebe, isn't Jethro Tull a band?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (proud of herself) Oh yes, they are.
OPENING CREDITS
Chandler and Monica's apartment

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (he enters) Hey honey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (Looking inside the fridge, and we only see his back. Then he closes the door, and we see it's Joey.) Hi sweetie!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Is Monica not here?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, then I'll tell you. My agency was bidding for a big account and they got it! It's my first national commercial!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Cool!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, and I don't wanna brag but a lot of the ideas were mine! (silence) Hell, you weren't there? All the ideas were mine!!!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That's great! Hey, can you cast me in it?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh... I don't know, I really don't think you're right for the part.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What do you mean? I can do anything, I'm a chameleon! Huh? (he mimes an old man with a beard) I'm old! (then he yawns) I'm tired! (then he mimes someone who's hot...) Hey, I'm hot (...and cold) I'm cold!! Huh?? Come on! What can't I do?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: First of all. Bravo. Uh, but I really don't think you're right for this. The part calls for a stuffy college professor.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I can do that! (in a deeper voice) "Hello, I'm your professor. When I'm not busy thinking of important things or... professing. I like to use..." Oh, what's the product?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Software that facilitates inter-business networking e-solutions?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (after a long pause he starts miming again) I'm cold!
Central Perk. Charlie is sitting on the couch and Ross enters.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (to Charlie) Hey!

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Guess who's a finalist for a huge research grant! I'll give you a hint, he's looking right at you.

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Ah, well, unless it's the creepy guy with his hand up his kilt, I'm gonna say congratulations!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh, I'm so excited, I mean, apparently I beat out hundreds of other applicants, included five guys I went to graduate school with. Not that I'm keeping score or anything... five!

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Wow, that's great! So, tell me about the grant!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, ok, it's for 25 thousand dollars. And if I get it, I'll finally be able to complete my field research! And there will be an article about me in the "Paleontology Review"! Yeah! That'll be the first time my name is in there, without people raising serious questions about my work!

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Wait. Are you talking about the Dewar grant?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah. Why?

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Benjamin Hobart is administering that grant.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Your ex-boyfriend?

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: So, your ex-boyfriend is gonna determine if your new boyfriend gets this grant? Wow, your new boyfriend is screwed!

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: No, no, we ended up in great terms. I mean, if anything, I think this could help you. You know what? Why don't we all go out to dinner together, and I can introduce you.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, if you think it would help.

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Yes, absolutely. I'll call him.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Ok, now, is there anything I can do to... you know, butter him up? Anything he really likes?

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Mmh... he does have a pretty serious latex fetish.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: We'll see how dinner goes.
Phoebe's apartment. She is packing a few tings into boxes.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (looking at Monica entering) Hey!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey, you wanna go to see a movie?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, I told you I had to spend all the day clearing out stuff, so Mike could move in.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, right.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, well. Now that I'm here I might as well help you with the cleaning and organizing! Just happen to have my label maker!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, it's so hard to get rid of stuff! Did you and Chandler have to make compromises when you first moved in together?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Uh, Chandler did! What does he want you to give up?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: A bunch of stuff. And the worst one... he wants me to get rid of Gladys.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Who's Gladys? (Phoebe shows her a horrific painting with a half-a-body girl dummy coming out of the frame. Monica's frightened and she gasps.) Oh! What a tragic loss!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah. I really hate to give her up. Oh, I know!! Oh, you should take her!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (faking happiness) Well, I-I-I-I... I don't know...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Why, you don't like her?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, of course I do. What's not to like! I'll take her in a minute! But, you know, I think that you're giving up too easy, honey. I think that you need to fight for her!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Really? You think?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Absolutely! Yes, you say to him "I'm sorry Mike I can't live without her, she means too much to me!"

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ok, I'll fight for her. Ok! Oh, wait, oh I just realized... if I do that, that means you don't get her.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Damn it, I did not think this through!
Central Perk. Rachel, Joey and Emma are there.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey you guys.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh! Any word on casting yet?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Joe, I told you, you're just not right for the part.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What do you mean? Rach, don't I seem like a professor you'd buy some kind of e-crap from?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I'm sorry, this sounds like something I'm never gonna be interested in.

Joey (to Chandler): Look, c'mon, please? It's not like I'm asking for some crazy favour. This is what I do for a living. I am a professional actor! (he glances at his watch and sees the time) Oh, man, I'm two hours late for work! (he stands, ready to go). Look, here's a copy of my reels. It's got all the commercials that I've been in.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Joe...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Just watch it, and if you don't like it, you don't pass it on to your bosses!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Fine!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Thank you. (he sits down)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Work, Joe!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Damn it! (he leaves)
Chandler (to Rachel): What am I gonna do now?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Just pass it to your boss!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: He's not right for the part. So if I suggest him, my bosses are gonna think I'm an idiot! And that's something they should learn on their own!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Just tell Joey that you watched the tape and you liked it, but your bosses didn't. Then that way, you're the good guy and they're the bad guys.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: That's good! I liked it, they didn't. (he sees Joey out of the window hitting on a girl) Joey, for God's sake, go to work! (Joey runs away).
A restaurant. Ross and Charlie are waiting for her ex-boyfriend, Benjamin Hobart

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I can't believe I'm about to meet Benjamin Hobart. I've always thought of him as one of the people I'd invite to my fantasy dinner party. Do you think there's any chance he'll bring Christie Brinkley or C3PO?

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: (glances over Ross' shoulder) Sorry, looks like it's just him.

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: Charlie! My God, you look absolutely stunning!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, I... I am having a good hair day.

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: So good to see you.

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Me too. (she and Benjamin are hugging for very long and Ross starts pretending to clear his throat, until they stop)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I'm ok.

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: I'm sorry... (introduces them to each other) Ross Geller... Benjamin Hobart.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It's an honor to meet you. I can't tell you how long I've been an admirer of your work, I mean, that Nobel prize, (he thumbs up) whoooo! I mean, I have to tell you that, you're one of the reasons I got into the field.

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: Oh, well, likewise. Actually, not likewise. I've never heard of you until this morning, but, it's nice to be nice!

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Shall we? (they sit down and Benjamin takes Ross' chair).

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: (to Ross) Thank you! (to Charlie). I can't believe that you chose this restaurant! Do you remember the night?

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Oh my God, I completely forgot! (they laugh) Oh my God! I can't believe they let us back in this place! (they laugh more, and Ross start laughing too).
Benjamin (to Ross): You weren't there!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No, but, it's, you know, it's just a funny image, you know, the two of you, in this restaurant, with... (laughs nervously)tzz-zzz, mmm.

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Ross, why don't you tell Benji about your proposal, while I go to the ladies room?

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: So, tell me about it.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Ok well, I would like to do a dig in the painted desert.

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: M-m.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: See, there are still several areas that haven't been fully excavated.

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: Break up with Charlie!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Did you just say "break up with Charlie"?

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: Well, yes, and now. Yes I did say it, and no, I didn't not say it.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Kind of inappropriate, don't you think?

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: I'm sorry. I just haven't seen her for so long! All these feelings are rushing back! I'm starting to realize how much I missed her, and I'm gonna need you to break up with her.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Are you serious?

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: If you say yes then I'm serious, if you say no then I'm joking!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: Joking it is!
Monica's apartment. Phoebe enters the room.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hi! Sorry, I'm late.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey, how did it go with Mike, is he gonna let you keep the painting?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No, he really hates it. But he's gonna let me keep my box of human hair! So you got to pick your battles. But the good news is, Gladys is yours!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Wow, what's the bad news!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Who's Gladys?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, she's that work of art I made, you know, with the woman coming out of the frame.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (sarcastic) Oh, and Monica gets to keep her? In her house? I am so jealous!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, I didn't know you wanted her too!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Huh!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, I mean, sure, of course. But... you already gave that to Monica, so...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You know, I would give her up, for you.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No, I couldn't let you do that.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: But I want to.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: But I don't want you to.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: But I insist!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: But I insist harder!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Girls, girls, stop, ok? We'll flip a coin. Heads, she's Rachel's, tails she's Monica's. (she flips the coin). Tails! Monica, she's yours!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No, that landed in your food!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (sarcastic) No, no, that's ok. You won fair and square. I'm so sad!
Chandler walks into Joey's apartment

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey Joe!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What's up?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Bad news. I watched the tape and passed it along to my bosses and they weren't interested.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (sounds disappointed) Oh.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (Hands the tape back to him) I'm sorry man.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (looks at him suspiciously) But, ehm... you watched the tape?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (sounds nervous) Yeah! I... I... I liked it! (Joey continues to look at him suspiciously) But, ehm... my bosses didn't go for it. Stupid sons of bitches!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (sounds confident) You didn't watch the tape.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (looks surprised) What!? Of course I did!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Look, it's one thing not to cast me, but to lie to me?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'm not lying to you, I watched it!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, you lied again! (Rachel comes out of her room and is observing the conversation)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I watched it!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Keep going Pinocchio!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (now yelling) (pretending to look shocked) I did!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (yelling back) No you didn't! (turns and goes towards his room)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (following him) I'm telling you, I watched the tape. (Reaches Joey's room and Joey slams the door in his face)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Did you watch the tape?
Chandler:(In a sarcastic "of course not"!-tone) No!
Interview room. Ross and two other professors (one man, one woman) are sitting on one side of a long desk. Benjamin Hobart is sitting on the other side

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: The selection committee has chosen the three of you as our finalists today. The ultimate decision will be based upon the answers you give to the questions I ask here. I'm gonna start with Dr. Li. Dr. Li, you claim the field is too reliant on the Linnaean taxonomic system. How do you propose to correct this problem?

lines.speaker: Dr. Li
lines.text: Well, I believe that the answers lie in the osteological evidence. I plan to begin there.

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: (nods) Interesting.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (Rolls his eyes) I guess!

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: Dr. Biely, your proposal includes some field work. Where might that take place?

lines.speaker: Dr. Biely
lines.text: Primarily in the Pierre Shale region of South Dakota.

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: Certainly. Very well. And Dr. Geller, when is my birthday?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (shocked and confused by the question) What? I... I... (Benjamin looks at him as if to say "What's wrong? Answer the question")

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: Care to venture a guess?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (annoyed) May 12th?

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: (looks surprised and un-impressed) That's not even kinda close! (Ross looks around confused) Dr. Li, how many graduate students you'd be needing?

lines.speaker: Dr. Li
lines.text: Half a dozen.

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: I see, and Dr. Biely?

lines.speaker: Dr. Biely
lines.text: Three for excavation and two for analysis.

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: Certainly. Dr. Geller, which 1965 Shirelles hit was later covered by a popular British invasion band?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (even more shocked) Wha..? I need 6 graduate students.

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: No! I'm sorry, we were looking for "Baby It's You". Baby It's You.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Wha...? Wait, wait, wait, just a minute. None of my questions have anything to do with Paleontology.

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: You're right, I apologize. Scratch the last question. Spell "Boscodictiasaur".

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (annoyed) um... I've never heard of a "Boscodictiasaur".

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: Yeah, I just made it up. Spell it.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (stares at him angrily) Ok. (determined to spell it correctly) B - O - S ...

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: No, it starts with a silent "M".

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh come on!!
Joey and Rachel's apartment. Chandler and Rachel are talking.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I can't believe Joey. I hate being called a liar!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: But you are a liar.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What did I just say?
Joey comes out of his room

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You still here?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yes, and I have to say, I am not just hurt. I am insulted. When I tell somebody I did something...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ok whoah-hey... Let me just stop you right there, ok? First, you lied, right? Then, you lied about lying, ok? Then you lied about lying about lying, ok? So before you lie about lying about lying about lying about... lying... (loses count and begins to count the number of 'lyings' in the air but gives up.) (yelling) Stop lying!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Why are you so sure I didn't watch this tape?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (very angry) You wanna know wh...? You wanna know why? (goes back into his room)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, this is going well. (Chandler looks worried)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (comes out holding the tape) Here's how I know you didn't watch the tape, ok? (puts it into the vcr) If you had seen what was on this tape, believe me, you would have some comments. Alright, now remember, I got paid a lot of money for this and it only aired in Japan. (presses play and he appears on the TV screen and a TV commercial begins)
The commercial:

Joey says "Ichiban". It displays a few girls dancing around and Joey fills most of the screen, he puts something blue on his lips and smacks them saying "Lipstick For Men!" It goes on to show him playing a guitar and putting on more blue lipstick. In the end he says seductively "Ichiban... Lipstick For Men" and "Sahiko" and it ends. Chandler and Rachel are speechless.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (Yelling at Chandler) And that's how I know you didn't watch the tape! (goes back to his room and slams the door).
Silence

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: He really is a chameleon.
Monica's apartment. Phoebe enters carrying the horrific 'painting' of Gladys. Monica and Rachel are sitting on the couch.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (smiling from ear to ear) Well, Gladys say hello to your new home! (she holds out the 'painting')

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (faking happiness) Oh, my!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (surprised by how ugly it is) Wow! (sarcastic) Oh, she's so nice and big! Oh, Monica, where are you going to display Gladys oh so proudly? (looks around for a spot)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (sounds desperate, knowing what Rachel is trying to do) I haven't really settled on a spot yet!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, hey! How about right above the TV? (Points to the spot where her famous French poster is hanging). That way, it will be the first thing that you see when you walk in the door!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (genuinely excited about it) Yeah, yeah! And you can get rid of that French poster.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (offended) I like that poster!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Really? It doesn't have anything coming out of it. Or maybe there is some place for her in your bedroom?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (jumps at the chance to make that happen) Oh! There's nothing above your bed!!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (Impatient with Rachel) Are you still here?
Ross' office. Ross is pacing and Benjamin enters

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh hi! Hello! Uh, have you come to ask me some more paleontology related questions? Uhm... your grandmother's nickname, perhaps? (Now yelling) Aunt Margaret's pants size?

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: I've come here to apologize. I think I may have let my feelings for Charlie interfere with the interview process.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (Sarcastic) No! Stop!

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: Anyway, I've decided to offer you the grant.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (Skeptical) Really?

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: Well... there is just one small... stipulation...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I have to break up with Charlie?

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: Hey, you got one right!
Ross shakes his head

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You're crazy.

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: Crazy, or... romantic?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Crazy!

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: Ooor...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (Yelling) Get out! (Benjamin leaves)
Joey and Rachel's apartment.
Rachel enters, checking the mail, then looks up and sees Gladys placed on the barcalounger.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: O-oh my God!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (enters from his bedroom) What?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Joey, what... is... this...thing... doing here?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I got it from Monica. She sold it to me for a very reasonable price.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Joey, we're not keeping this!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: But it's an original Buffay...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Alright, fine. You can keep it. As long as you don't mind that she's haunted.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey? what? what? wey! whoo! what? what!?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, legend has it Joey, that... she comes alive when you're asleep.
Joey's eyes are twice their size now, and looks nervously from Rachel to Gladys and back.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: She climbs out of the frame, and then drags her half-a-body across the floor, just looking for legs to steal. (in a spooky, slow voice) And then with her one good hand, she slo-o-owly re-e-a-aches up and turns your doorknob.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: GET THAT LEGLESS WITCH OUT OF HERE!
Joey leaves for his bedroom, and Rachel grins. She then takes Gladys and enters Monica's apartment.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey! I sold that to Joey.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, why I told him it's haunted. Two can play at this game. (gives Gladys to Monica)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No, too late. You can't give it back! (she pushes the painting back to Rachel)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yes I can! (pushes her back again)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No you can't. She's yours!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: She's yours!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: SHE'S YOURS!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: She's yours!
While they are both pushing the painting towards each other, Phoebe enters

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey! (there's a pause)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: She's mine!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: She's m-i-i-ne!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: She's mine!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: She's mine!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You guys! You guys! You don't have to fight over her anymore. (she goes out into the hallway and enters with an even more hideous painting/collage. One of those faceles mannequins heads wearing a blueish dress and orange gloves reaching out into the room. Around the head 3 small dolls are hovering.) Whoever doesn't get Gladys gets Glynnis. (Rachel and Monica are gasping for air at the sight of this monstrous piece of art.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I want Gladys!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: She's mine!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: She's mine!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: She's mine!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: She's mine!
Rachel and Joey's. Joey's home alone, reading a Sports Illustrated magazine when Chandler enters.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Look, I'm sorry I didn't give them your tape. And I promise, next time to submit you whether I think you are right for the part or not.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That's not the point Chandler. The point is that you lied.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I know. You're right. What's it gonna take for you to forgive me?
Central Perk. Monica, Phoebe and Rachel are on the couch.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my God!
we see Joey and Chandler standing there, and Chandler is wearing the blue Ichiban lipstick!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Excellent!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Now, what do you say?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Lying is wrong!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: And?... AND?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'm a pretty little girl.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I knew it!
Central Perk. Some time later that day. The group has left and Charlie is there when Ross enters.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Your ex-boyfriend is insane.

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Did you get the grant?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No I didn't, and you want to know why? Because your ex-boyfriend is still in love with you.

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah. He wouldn't give me the grant, because I wouldn't give you up.

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Benji isn't in love with me. I mean, he broke up with me. And besides, he's a very ethical man.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Really? Is it ethical to ask someone in a grant review, who was the voice of "Underdog"?

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: I'm sure he was just joking, Ross.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: If you don't believe me, let's go talk to him, okay? I'm telling you, he didn't ask me one paleontological question.

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Seriously?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh, I'm sorry, no. He did ask me one. Uhm... How do you spell Mboscodictiosaur?

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Well, if it's like the lake Mbosco in Congo, then M-B-O...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Damnit!
Benjamin's office. Ross and Charlie are entering.

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: Dr. Geller...? Charlie... What are you... what are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I want you to tell her everything. About the deal you tried to make with me, about the crazy questions you... Wally Cox! That's the voice of Underdog!

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: Like I tried to tell you in the interview Ross, this grant is not based on your knowledge of pretty useless trivia.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No, no, no. Don't do that! I want you to look her in the eyes, and tell her the truth.

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Benji?

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: Alright, it's true. I behaved horribly. But it's only because I still love you. And I would do anything to have you back in my life.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Too little, too late, Benji!

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: I can't believe this.

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: I never should have broken up with you. I think about you all the time. I mean, do you ever still think about me?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (indignant) No!

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Yes!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: I don't know what to say, Benji. This is all so.... romantic.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: or...

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: Listen, I know, I may be way out of bounds here, but is there any chance you will take me back?

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Maybe...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Sweetie, this conversation is starting to make me a little uncomfortable.

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Oh God! I am so sorry, but... (she puts her hand on Ross's cheek) I mean it's... there's so much history between us, you know...

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: (puts his hand on Ross's other cheek) I'm sorry too...
Charlie and Benji both let their hands slide down Ross's face, until their hands meet, and they hold hands.

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: I love you!

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: I love you too! (and they start to kiss)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay, that's it. WE ARE SEEING OTHER PEOPLE!
COMMERCIAL BREAK
Joey's bedroom. Joey's asleep with Hugsy, the penguin right next to him.
There are scratching and squeaking noises coming from the living room, and Joey wakes up, terrified. He pulls his blanket higher. The doorknob is turning.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Gladys?
The door opens, and there is Gladys, still in her frame though. Joey panics and moves frantically, screaming. Then there is laughing, and the painting is lowered. It was Rachel holding Gladys.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ha ha ha, third time this week. Man, this does not get old.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You're mean!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, don't be such a baby!
She closes his door again, and turns around. Then she starts screaming, terrified. There is Glynnis... And Monica holding her up, laughing.
End
